sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n11470" key="a)para/lektos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπαρά-λεκτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n11470.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with disordered hair,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0486.tlg001:195" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Pherecr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">195</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
